I'll try searching for events on December 1 again to locate the event we want to update.
I see that we're having trouble searching for events on December 1. Let me try a different approach by searching for events with "Risk Management" in the name or on that date range.
I'm having persistent issues with searching events. Let me check if there are any events in the system at all by searching for a general event query.

I'm unable to search for events at this time. The system is not responding to the calendar search function calls. 

Since I can't locate the event on December 1 or any event related to "Risk Management Forum", I'm unable to update its name. The error suggests there might be a technical issue with the calendar functionality.

I recommend checking with the system administrator or trying again later when the calendar service is available. If you have the event ID or more specific details about the event, I could potentially help with updating it if the function calls work properly.
